diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The diagnosis was based on immunophenotypic analysis showing low absolute lymphocyte number, CD4+ and CD19+ lymphocyte counts, and lymphocyte activation rates with PHA and ConA being ¼ of the control. Additionally, a skin biopsy revealed non-Langerhans cell histiocytosis, and genetic testing identified a homozygous missense mutation in the PRKDC gene (c.9239T>G; L3061R).
